recommended_paths: needs_resolution: wire runtime-only tenant-admin credentials into the stage mutation navigation CI step, or explicitly split that step out of release-gating evidence until credentials are available.
exact_next_step: Record reviewer resolutions in the governing TODO using the machine-checkable resolution table or equivalent gate ledger, then extract the derived resolution packet and decide whether another bounded review pass is still required.

findings.title: Stage mutation navigation gate omits credentials required by the hardened harness
findings.rationale: tools/flutter/web_app_tests/guard_web_navigation_policy.cjs:32 hard-blocks every mutation run unless NAV_ADMIN_EMAIL and NAV_ADMIN_PASSWORD are present, and tools/flutter/run_web_navigation_smoke.sh:58 runs that guard before listing or executing tests. However .github/workflows/orchestration-ci-cd.yml:418 invokes the stage mutation smoke with only lane, URLs, and HTTPS settings; it does not pass the required runtime credentials. A read-only reproduction with NAV_WEB_TEST_TYPE=mutation NAV_DEPLOY_LANE=stage and no credentials exits 1 with the guard error. Because .github/workflows/orchestration-ci-cd.yml:457 only marks stage successful when stage_navigation_mutation_smoke succeeds, the release gate cannot reproduce the package's local '18 passed' mutation evidence in CI.
findings.suggested_action: Add NAV_ADMIN_EMAIL and NAV_ADMIN_PASSWORD from appropriate GitHub secrets to the stage mutation navigation smoke env, with masking and no committed fallback, and add a workflow/static guard that any non-main mutation smoke invocation supplies the credentials required by the harness.
